channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Jazz Bass (2016, Olympic White) with Rosewood Fingerboard – Very Good Condition | Tested by Mostly Music — $299
item.description:
$299 · Very Good · Mostly Music

MOSTLY MUSIC CERTIFIED INSPECTION This Squier Vintage Modified Jazz Bass was received on consignment from a customer who took good care of it. We thoroughly inspected and play-tested the instrument, checking the neck, frets, electronics, hardware, and overall setup. It is in Very Good condition and plays excellently.

THE INSTRUMENT & WHAT IT IS The Squier Vintage Modified Jazz Bass is a classic-inspired 4-string bass that delivers the iconic Jazz Bass tone and feel at an accessible price. With its offset waist, comfortable neck, and versatile electronics, it’s a favorite among players looking for that classic Fender-style sound with modern reliability. The Olympic White finish and tortoiseshell pickguard give it a timeless look that works across many musical styles.

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

  • Body: Basswood
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyester
  • Body Shape: Jazz Bass®
  • Neck: Maple, “C” Shape
  • Neck Finish: Gloss Urethane
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
  • Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 20
  • Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
  • Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.5" (38.1 mm)
  • Position Inlays: White Pearloid Dot
  • Truss Rods: Standard
  • Bridge: 4-Saddle Vintage-Style
  • Pickups: Fender® Designed Single-Coil Jazz Bass® (Neck & Bridge)
  • Pickup Configuration: SS
  • Controls: Volume 1 (Middle Pickup), Volume 2 (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone
  • Control Knobs: Knurled Dome
  • Pickguard: 4-Ply Tortoiseshell
  • Hardware Finish: Chrome
  • Tuning Machines: Standard Open-Gear
  • Strings: Nickel Plated Steel (.045–.105 Gauges)
  • Orientation: Right-Hand

CONDITION & COSMETICS – OUR BUY-IN REPORT Rated Very Good condition. This bass shows only light signs of normal use and play. The finish has some minor cosmetic marks consistent with careful ownership, but nothing major. The neck is straight, the frets are in good shape with plenty of life remaining, and all electronics function cleanly. The hardware and tuning machines operate smoothly. We photographed the instrument thoroughly so you can see the actual condition.

PLAYABILITY & SOUND NOTES FROM OUR TESTING This bass plays very well with a comfortable setup and responsive feel. The medium jumbo frets and 9.5" radius fingerboard make it easy to play, whether you’re using fingerstyle or a pick. It delivers classic Jazz Bass tone — clear, articulate, and punchy — with good sustain and note definition. The two volumes and master tone control give you plenty of tonal flexibility. No buzzing, dead spots, or setup issues were found.

WHAT’S INCLUDED WITH THIS BASS Squier Vintage Modified Jazz Bass in the Very Good condition described. No case or gig bag is included.

MOSTLY MUSIC USAGE TIPS & REAL-WORLD APPLICATIONS The Squier Vintage Modified Jazz Bass is a versatile and reliable instrument that works great across many styles — from rock, funk, and blues to indie, alternative, and modern worship music. Its classic Jazz Bass voice and comfortable playability make it an excellent choice for beginners stepping up to a real bass, intermediate players building their first serious instrument, or experienced players looking for a dependable, great-sounding backup. The Vintage Modified series is known for offering classic Fender-inspired features and solid build quality at a very accessible price point.

WHY BUY FROM MOSTLY MUSIC We’re not just moving gear — we’re players who opened a store because we know this stuff inside and out. This listing is transparent because that’s how we operate. You’re getting a fully functional Squier Vintage Modified Jazz Bass with honest condition notes, real testing, and practical application knowledge. Questions? Message us anytime. We actually get it.

item.title: Fernandes RPB-38 1990 Japan Precision Bass Guitar — $870.12
item.description:
$870.12 · Very Good · Guitarman - Melbourne

Great vintage MIJ Bass - well made. Has been set up and serviced, fret leveled, re-crowned and all electronics works well. Truss rod has ample adjustment. Comes with soft gig bag - hardcase can be arranged for an extra cost. Located in Ferntree Gully, VIC.

  • Body: Alder.
  • Neck: Maple with a 34" scale length and a moderate rounded "C" profile.
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood with a 9.5" radius and 42mm nut width.
  • Pickups: Original Fernandes RPB split single-coil.
  • Hardware: Standard vintage-style bridge and tuners.
  • Weight:  4.1kg.

item.title: Sadowsky NYC Verdine White pj 4 string Bass — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Very Good · Bear's Music Den

MODEL Deluxe Satin Series Verdine White

SERIAL #8228

FINISH Caramel Burst

BODY Flame maple on chambered ash

WEIGHT 7.65

NECK Maple with thin matte nitro finish

FINGERBOARD Maple, 12″ radius, 1.5″ nut width

PICKGUARD None

HARDWARE Chrome

PICKUPS Sadowsky humcancelling PJ

PREAMP Sadowsky preamp with vintage tone control

Sadowswky Gig Bag

Sadowsky Guitar Strap w/straplocks

Sadowsky tools, polish cloth, guitar stand neck protector.

Original Owner.

item.title: Status Series II 5 string 1987 - Cherry red — $2,250
item.description:
$2,250 · Good · David's G.A.S. Works


Status Series II 5 String bass, serial 26 made in 1987. Red maple facing with Cherry back and blue pinstripe according to Status. Also has their TB42 circuit with humbucking pickups.

As you can see the bass has been well played. Lots of wear and tear. As per Reverb terms this qualifies as Good condition. Pots are a little bit scratchy but everything works as it should. Weight is just under 9.5lbs on my bathroom scale.

Love this vintage Status, but cutting the collection down from current ridiculous size. I have other Statii listed, If those sell may decide to pull this listing and keep it.

Will ship with gig bag good enough to protect for shipping. Free shipping in lower 48

item.title: Fender P Bass Deluxe — $999
item.description:
$999 · Very Good · Kennys

This is a Partscasters, it is all very good parts. It is a blue sparkle American deluxe body. And aftermarket American made neck.
American EMG electronics and PGX pickups. Solid metal chrome pickguard. Fender locking strap locks
The bass plays very nicely and currently has flat wounds. It stays in tune very nice as well. It comes with a hardshell case

item.title: Warwick Dolphin Pro I 1996 LAST of the Handmade! BOIRE Wood!! No Volute! EXCELLENT Condition! ORIGINAL CUSTOM CUT FLIGHT CASE!! — $7,000
item.description:
$7,000 · Excellent · The Bass Connoisseur

1996 Warwick Dolphin Pro I | Natural Oil Finish Boiré African Rosewood Body | My #1

Thirty-Year-Old Mastery in Excellent Condition!
Stamped June 1996 (F in the serial), this bass represents the very last of Warwick’s Boiré (African Rosewood) bodies on the Dolphin model — and it showcases the absolute peak of their hand-contoured craftsmanship up to that point in the company’s history. After 1996 they discontinued this wood for the Dolphin; only two more known hand-shaped Boiré bodies ever turned up, and those were used in 1997 after the shop had already relocated to Markneukirchen, and they had Cnc'd Necks with Volutes.
That puts this instrument among an extremely small handful of its kind on the planet...
Last few of the original spec'd made with love and focus.

These basses were never a production line bass like the mass produced bolt-ons. Even the other neck through basses were made in significant numbers compared to the Dolphin basses. The Flagship or excellence and detail. Every single one was hand-shaped, one piece of wood at a time, by builders who knew exactly what they were doing. No two from this era play or sound quite the same — the density, the grain, the way the neck was carved that day — it all lives in the instrument. This one has its own unmistakable voice: deep, piano-like lows with woody warmth and sustain, growling or clear melodic mids, and crisp, tight highs that cut through. It walks a jazz line with grace and bites for rock or metal when you dig in, all without ever fighting you. The active electronics give it extra dimension and snap, but the soul is all in the wood and the build.

The neck is a rock-solid 7-piece Wenge/Zebrano through-neck with a wenge fretboard and mother-of-pearl dolphin inlays. It carries a modern, slightly flatter C-profile — fast, smooth, and stable as an arrow from the first fret to the 26th on this long-scale (34") instrument. No relief issues, low action, and thanks to the concave sculpted back and that beautifully angled upper horn, it balances perfectly on your body with zero neck dive. It just pulls into you naturally, like no other bass I’ve ever played — even compared to all my other Dolphin Pro I’s.

This bass was Plek’d and professionally set up by Mike Lull at his shop in Washington state in 2019.
When I picked it up from him, he told me it was one of the most amazing-feeling and musical basses he had ever played. This has been my #1 since I replaced a stolen ’93 model back in ’96. Of all the Dolphins I’ve owned and played over the years (nearly twenty of them), this is the definitive one. There’s the magic of a Dolphin Pro I… and then there’s this!~

It’s in excellent condition with all-original electronics that have never been altered or replaced (only routine battery changes, and they last a long time in this bass). Original everything except one tuner. The neck is straight and true, the Platinum hardware is just something to marvel, and it plays like a dream of effortless flow easing it's way in through and back out of your refined and beautiful.

Non-Smoker, Adult Hygienic Player and Collector.

  • Body: Boiré (African Rosewood) — discontinued for this model in 1996; only two more hand-shaped Boiré wood bodies in this wood were later found and used in 1997, after the Warwick shop relocated to Markneukirchen
  • Neck: 7-piece Wenge/Zebrano
  • Width at Nut / 24th fret: 44 mm / 63 mm
  • Neck Thickness, 1st fret / 24th fret: 21 mm / 24 mm
  • Construction: Through-Body (Hidden Neck-Through)
  • Fretboard: Wenge, Inlays Mother-of-Pearl "Dolphins"
  • Scale: long scale (86.4 cm / 34")
  • Frets: 26
  • Hardware: Platinum ( Satin Chrome )
  • String Action (nut / 12th fret / 24th fret) — G string: 1 mm / 2.5 mm / 2 mm
  • String Action (nut / 12th fret / 24th fret) — E string: 1 mm / 2.5 mm / 2 mm
  • Pickups: MEC®, active J/TJ combination
  • Electronics: MEC®, active BEC II, 2-way
  • Controls: 1 stacked volume & balance with center click, push/pull for active/passive.
    1 stacked bass/treble, push/pull for single coil/twin coil on bridge pickup, cut or boost from center position
  • Overall length: 114.5 cm
  • Weight: 4.5 kg
  • Strings: Rotosound Swing Bass, Nickel, Medium "M" .045"–.105"
  • Finish: Natural Oil Finish

    What’s Included:
  • New extra set of Rotosound Swing Bass Nickel medium strings (matching what’s currently on it)
  • Near-new can of Warwick’s own custom-blended wax for the natural oil finish
  • Brand-new Mono Betty XL wide padded strap
  • Factory-installed Dunlop Recessed Straplocks
  • Original Warwick natural wood panel flight case with the Dolphin Pro I-specific form-cut interior

*** See my other items for more great basses, bass amps, speaker cabs and combos, and other incredible Vintage gear!

*** Flawless 5 Star Feedback here on Reverb and 28 years of Flawless Feedback on eBay and TalkBass.

My promise to you, this bass, like anything that I part with will always be shipped with my expert experience, extreme care, and quality packing materials.
I want you to be excited when you receive your item, I want it to be a happy and positive experience that many miss the opportunity to give. I care about my items, and I care about them going to their new homes just as much, if not more because they are new to you. I want you have the rare joy of getting something truly special from someone who, "gets it."

-CJ

item.title: Squier Pete Wentz Signature Precision Bass — $399
item.description:
$399 · Good · Kennys

The customer that brought this to us the original neck was broken which the only difference between this replacement neck and the original was the black heart on the . The necks are the same between the two. It plays just fine. It comes with some red Fender strap locks. The electronics function well. It is a good bass

item.description:
$2,981.22 · Excellent · Alex's Gear Garage

Basse Mayones Jabba Bassic 5 cordes, état impeccable, fournie avec sa housse deluxe d’origine.

item.title: Custom 5 String Bass, Solid Wenge Wood Body, Maple Neck Through — $398.99
item.description:
$398.99 · Excellent · Myles Music Shop

size: 43 inch Body: solid wenge wood Fingerboard: technical wood neck: Canada maple Frets: 24F Machine Head: Chrome Diecast Finish: matte color: brown

item.title: Peavey Milestone 4-String Electric Bass — $195
item.description:
$195 · Good · Kennys

The is in OK condition. It plays good and it sounds good. It has some aftermarket in it. They have a good fat sound. It's pretty lightweight which is nice. There are some scratches on the back. It has smooth and easy action and all the electronics work

item.title: Custom Left Handed 6 String Electric Bass, Rosewood Veneer Top Body, Maple Neck Through — $534.99
item.description:
$534.99 · Excellent · Myles Music Shop

size: 43 inch Top material：rose veneer Back and side: sapele wood Fingerboard: synthetic wood Frets: 24F Finish: Matte

item.title: CARVIN BASS - SB 5000 - 5 String Electric Bass — $1,499
item.description:
$1,499 · Excellent · Harvey's Drum Shoppe

Carvin SB500 Electric Bass in near mint condition with Maple Top & Matching Headstock. Original owner, super clean and sounds absolutely extraordinary. These don't come up often and/or in this condition of excellence. Serial # 112730


Please see all photos for condition and details.


Any questions, Please Ask


FREE SAME DAY SHIPPING 


 I DO NOT SHIP TO HAWAII OR PUERTO RICO

item.title: Carvin SB4000 2012 - Translucent Blue — $875
item.description:
$875 · Very Good · Saxon's Musical Wares

Swamp Ash body, Birdseye fingerboard, Maple neck, Upgraded Hipshot Ultralite Tuners, tuned and set up in DB Standard, but can be easily swapped back to E Standard. It's recently had a fret level, fret polish, and fret jig, so it plays buttery smooth. Comes with extra strings for Db tuning and OHSC.

Light buckle rash on the back and small scuff on the tip of the headstock, but that's all the blemishes I could find.

Weight: ~10lbs

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 5 HH with Ebony Fretboard 2018 - Present - Brulee — $2,203.17
item.description:
$2,203.17 · Excellent · Kevin's Boutique

StingRay5 Special 5 HH 5-String Electric Bass with Case - Brulee

MINT MINT MINT MINT MINT

Less than a year old. Never rigged and never left my house. It still has Long & Mcquade warranty as well.

Price is firm

Description

First introduced in 1976, the StingRay has been revered as one of the most iconic bass guitars in history. The StingRay was the first production four string bass to feature onboard active equalization. The flagship of the Music Man line, today's StingRay retains the same signature features that it had some forty years ago, including a solid roadworthy construction, iconic oval pickguard, 4+1 tuning key configuration, and the ever-popular Music Man humbucker - all of which combine to produce a look, feel, and sound that is remarkably unmistakable.

Specifications

BODY

Body Construction: Solid

Body Material: Select Hardwood

Body Finish: High Gloss Polyester

NECK

Material: Roasted Maple

Color: Natural

Joint: 5 Bolt Sculpted

Profile: C

Thickness at 1st Fret: 0.830 inches

Thickness at 12th Fret: 0.936 inches

Finish: Gunstock oil and hand-rubbed special wax blend

HEADSTOCK

Color/Finish: Natural

FRETBOARD

Material: Ebony

Radius: 11"

Inlays: Dot

Side Markers: Dot

Finish: Gunstock oil and hand-rubbed special wax blend

Fret Count, Size, Material: 22, .047 x .104, Stainless Steel

Scale Length: 34"

Nut Material, Width: Melamine, Compensated, 1-11/16"

HARDWARE

Hardware Color: Black

Bridge/Tailpiece: Vintage Music Man® top loaded chrome plated, steel bridge plate with vintage nickel plated steel saddles

Knob Type: Knurled Dome Top

Pickguard Material: Black

Tuning Machines: Custom Music Man, lightweight with tapered string posts and ergonomic clover design

ELECTRONICS

Electronics Type (active/passive): Active

Preamp: 3-band active preamp with 18 volts of headroom

Bridge Pickup: Neodymium Humbucker

Neck Pickup: Neodymium Humbucker

Controls: Volume, Treble, Mid and Bass knobs.

Output Type (mono/stereo): Mono

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1973 - Stunning last of the great 4-Bolt necks a Museum Quality example ! — $6,995
item.description:
$6,995 · Excellent · The Guitar Broker

We’ve just re-acquired another really clean & original 1973 Fender Jazz Bass w/all the right features from our last client whom just traded her back in. Its rich original Sunburst finish is over a lightweight Alder body, its rare White Bound & Block inlaid 4-bolt Rosewood neck is super clean w/nice logo & frets, it’s maple neck is quite clean & has its ink stamp visible from 1973 & she has 2 pot date codes dating to the 48th week of 1972 & 1 from the 5th week of 1973. Its got the last of the nice Tortoise pickgards pulling this all together making it one of Fender’s last great Jazzes. Its 2 pickups are super smooth w/that quintessential “Jazz Bass” sound ! It’s so cool & legit from its tuners to its bridge & every single screw from new. It has a gorgeous patina for a 53 year old original, it plays & feels incredible, she’s truly an exceptional example & comes w/a nice newer molded Hard Case.

item.title: Martin Stinger SBX - Orange — $275
item.description:
$275 · Good · Kennys

Everything is fully functional. The electronics work. The neck is straight. It plays just fine. There is currently a set of flat wounds on it. It stays in tune.

item.title: Fender Player Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 2018 - 2020 Buttercream — $515
item.description:
$515 · Very Good · The Analog Fill

Fender Player Precision Bass in Buttercream with maple fingerboard.

Very good condition with normal signs of use. Clean overall and presents well - second owner. Please see photos.

item.title: Fernandes PJS-50 PJ Bass 1980s MIJ Japan Medium Scale Red Limited Edition — $228
item.description:
$228 · Very Good · Reverty Used Guitars Japan

Reverty Used Guitars Japan ✓ Inspected & Ready to Ship

Carefully selected vintage & used instruments — shipped worldwide from Tokyo, Japan

We are a specialized guitar shop. Every item is individually inspected and maintained by our professional luthiers.

All items are sold exclusively through this store. Every photo shows the actual item you will receive — we never use stock or borrowed images.

All orders ship with full tracking and insurance. Your instrument will be carefully packed and delivered safely to your door.

► Product Overview Up for sale is a vintage Fernandes PJS-50 PJ Bass, made in Japan in the 1980s. This model features a comfortable medium scale (32-inch) neck and a compact dinky-style body, making it incredibly easy to play for bassists of all sizes. Equipped with a versatile P/J pickup configuration, it delivers a wide range of tones from punchy Precision growl to snappy Jazz articulation. Fernandes instruments from this era are highly regarded for their solid craftsmanship and excellent playability, making this a fantastic choice for both gigging musicians and collectors of Japan vintage gear. [Condition] •Cosmetic Condition: Very Good. There are some scratches, dings, and signs of wear on the body consistent with its age. The metal hardware shows some slight tarnishing. •Fret Remaining: About 60-70%. •Neck: Straight and in good playing condition. •Weight: 4.2 kg (9.25 lbs) •Serial Number: 4120831 [Accessories] •Soft case included. ► Professional Maintenance & Setup

Every guitar and bass is professionally maintained by our in-house luthier before shipping:

  • Body and hardware cleaning
  • Neck adjustment
  • Fretboard and fret cleaning
  • Action (string height) adjustment
  • Intonation adjustment
  • Tuning machine inspection
  • Electronics inspection
Authenticity: All items are genuine and sourced directly — never replicas or counterfeits.

Your instrument arrives ready to play.

► Important Notes Before Purchase
  • Pre-Owned Item: Normal signs of use may be present. All major issues are clearly described in this listing.
  • One-of-a-Kind: This is a used, unique item. Once sold, it cannot be restocked.
► Shipping Information Japan Post EMS 7–21 business days Reliable & cost-effective. Tracking included worldwide. FedEx / UPS 3–7 business days Fast & secure express delivery worldwide. Packaging: Each instrument is carefully packed with full padding and protection. Guitars are shipped with strings loosened to protect the neck during transit. For US Buyers — All-Inclusive Pricing (DDP):
The shipping cost shown already includes all US customs duties and import taxes. You will not be charged anything extra upon delivery.
Note: Our shipping rate to the US may appear higher than other sellers. This is because we pre-collect customs duties and taxes on your behalf — so there are no surprise charges at your door. [!] For International Buyers (outside the US): Import duties and taxes are NOT included in the shipping cost. You may be charged additional fees by your country's customs upon delivery. Please check your local regulations before purchasing.

We ship within 2–5 business days after payment is confirmed. A tracking number will be provided.

► Return & Trouble Policy

Returns and refunds are handled in accordance with eBay's standard return policy as set on this listing.

Important — Please Contact Us First:
If you have any concerns about your order — damage, missing parts, or anything unexpected — please message us before opening a case. We respond quickly and will do everything we can to resolve the issue fairly. Most problems can be solved much faster through direct communication. ► Complete Your Setup

Looking for strings, picks, straps, or a pedal to pair with your new guitar? Our store carries a wide selection of accessories, plus hard-to-find Japan-exclusive items and vintage effects pedals — all carefully sourced and inspected.

Browse our store — we may have exactly what you're looking for.

Questions? We're Here to Help!

Feel free to message us any time before purchasing. We respond within 24 hours and are happy to provide additional photos, demos, or any information you need.

Send Us a Message Reverty Used Guitars Japan — Trusted instruments shipped worldwide from Tokyo

item.title: Coolz ZJB-1R Blue Metallic Jazz Bass Made In Japan Fujigen 2011 Used w/Gig bag — $258
item.description:
$258 · Very Good · Reverty Used Guitars Japan

Reverty Used Guitars Japan ✓ Inspected & Ready to Ship

Carefully selected vintage & used instruments — shipped worldwide from Tokyo, Japan

We are a specialized guitar shop. Every item is individually inspected and maintained by our professional luthiers.

All items are sold exclusively through this store. Every photo shows the actual item you will receive — we never use stock or borrowed images.

All orders ship with full tracking and insurance. Your instrument will be carefully packed and delivered safely to your door.

► Product Overview

CoolZ ZJB-1R – Made in Japan by Fujigen for Shimamura Music

This is a CoolZ ZJB-1R, a high-quality Jazz Bass model crafted in Japan by Fujigen for Shimamura Music’s original brand, CoolZ.
Renowned for excellent craftsmanship and impressive cost performance, CoolZ instruments are highly regarded as reliable Japanese-made alternatives to Fender Japan.

Featuring an alder body, a 1-piece hard maple neck, and a rosewood fingerboard, this model follows the classic 1960s Jazz Bass construction.
Unlike the medium-scale version, this model features a full 864mm long scale, providing a traditional feel and tone.

The frets use the C.F.S. (Circle Fretting System), offering precise intonation and a smoother playing experience.
It is equipped with a JB700/CR spiral bridge, and the truss rod is adjustable from the headstock side — maintaining a vintage Jazz Bass vibe while adding modern practicality.

There are some light surface scratches from normal use, but no significant or noticeable damage. Overall, it remains in excellent condition.
The neck is straight and the frets have plenty of life left.

Weight: 4.25kg

► Condition Details Neck Straight Frets 70-80% Electronics Working Body / Finish
Tuners Working Modifications
Scratches & Wear Details:

Please see photos

Included Accessories: Soft case

► Professional Maintenance & Setup

Every guitar and bass is professionally maintained by our in-house luthier before shipping:

  • Body and hardware cleaning
  • Neck adjustment
  • Fretboard and fret cleaning
  • Action (string height) adjustment
  • Intonation adjustment
  • Tuning machine inspection
  • Electronics inspection
Authenticity: All items are genuine and sourced directly — never replicas or counterfeits.

Your instrument arrives ready to play.

► Important Notes Before Purchase
  • Pre-Owned Item: Normal signs of use may be present. All major issues are clearly described in this listing.
  • One-of-a-Kind: This is a used, unique item. Once sold, it cannot be restocked.
► Shipping Information Japan Post EMS 7–21 business days Reliable & cost-effective. Tracking included worldwide. FedEx / UPS 3–7 business days Fast & secure express delivery worldwide. Packaging: Each instrument is carefully packed with full padding and protection. Guitars are shipped with strings loosened to protect the neck during transit. For US Buyers — All-Inclusive Pricing (DDP):
The shipping cost shown already includes all US customs duties and import taxes. You will not be charged anything extra upon delivery.
Note: Our shipping rate to the US may appear higher than other sellers. This is because we pre-collect customs duties and taxes on your behalf — so there are no surprise charges at your door. [!] For International Buyers (outside the US): Import duties and taxes are NOT included in the shipping cost. You may be charged additional fees by your country's customs upon delivery. Please check your local regulations before purchasing.

We ship within 2–5 business days after payment is confirmed. A tracking number will be provided.

► Return & Trouble Policy

Returns and refunds are handled in accordance with eBay's standard return policy as set on this listing.

Important — Please Contact Us First:
If you have any concerns about your order — damage, missing parts, or anything unexpected — please message us before opening a case. We respond quickly and will do everything we can to resolve the issue fairly. Most problems can be solved much faster through direct communication. ► Complete Your Setup

Looking for strings, picks, straps, or a pedal to pair with your new guitar? Our store carries a wide selection of accessories, plus hard-to-find Japan-exclusive items and vintage effects pedals — all carefully sourced and inspected.

Browse our store — we may have exactly what you're looking for.

item.title: Coolz ZJB-1R Blue Metallic Jazz Bass Made In Japan Fujigen 2013 Used — $258
item.description:
$258 · Very Good · Reverty Used Guitars Japan

Product Description

◾️ For U.S. Buyers:
All of our items shipped to the United States already include import duties and taxes in the item price and shipping cost.
This means that no additional duties or taxes will be charged upon delivery .

Please rest assured—you will not be asked to pay anything extra when receiving your package.

Thank you for your purchase and enjoy shopping with confidence!

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

CoolZ ZJB-1R – Made in Japan by Fujigen for Shimamura Music

This is a CoolZ ZJB-1R, a high-quality Jazz Bass model crafted in Japan by Fujigen for Shimamura Music’s original brand, CoolZ.
Renowned for excellent craftsmanship and impressive cost performance, CoolZ instruments are highly regarded as reliable Japanese-made alternatives to Fender Japan.

Featuring an alder body, a 1-piece hard maple neck, and a rosewood fingerboard, this model follows the classic 1960s Jazz Bass construction.
Unlike the medium-scale version, this model features a full 864mm long scale, providing a traditional feel and tone.

The frets use the C.F.S. (Circle Fretting System), offering precise intonation and a smoother playing experience.
It is equipped with a JB700/CR spiral bridge, and the truss rod is adjustable from the headstock side — maintaining a vintage Jazz Bass vibe while adding modern practicality.

There are some light surface scratches from normal use, but no significant or noticeable damage. Overall, it remains in excellent condition.
The neck is straight and the frets have plenty of life left.

  • Weight: 4.1 kg

  • Includes: Soft case

Complete your setup!

If you're buying a guitar or bass, don't forget to check out our pedals and accessories to complete your rig.

All additional items like picks and pedals can be shipped together for free when purchased with this item.

🛠 Maintenance & Shipping Assurance
Every guitar and bass is professionally maintained before shipping:
・Body and hardware cleaning
・Neck adjustment
・Fretboard and fret cleaning
・Action (string height) adjustment
・Electronics inspection

All equipment is carefully packed using bubble wrap and custom protective materials to prevent damage during international transit.

👉
👉

◾️ Explore the world of Japanese vintage guitars

We proudly offer a curated selection of Japanese vintage guitars and basses , loved by players and collectors worldwide. Don?t miss our full lineup!

◾️

If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. Shipping

We ship directly from Japan using trusted international carriers such as eBay SpeedPak, Japan Post, FedEx, UPS, and DHL .

All shipments include a tracking number.

Your item will be carefully packed using bubble wrap and custom protective materials to prevent any damage during international transit.

In the rare case of loss or damage during shipping, we offer a full refund guarantee for your peace of mind.

International Buyers - Please Note:

Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These charges are the buyer's responsibility.
Please make sure to check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be before bidding or purchasing.

For U.S. buyers:
Due to recent changes in customs regulations, some items already include import duties in the item price and shipping cost.
If duties are included, this will be clearly displayed on the eBay checkout page.
For all other cases, duties and taxes will be charged locally by U.S. customs upon delivery, and buyers are required to pay them.
Please note that failure to pay customs duties and taxes may result in the package being held or returned, and the item cannot be received.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: Fender MIJ Aerodyne Special Precision Bass 2022 Speed Green Metallic w/Gig Bag — $703
item.description:
$703 · Excellent · Reverb + Imperial Vintage Guitars Co-op (San Diego)

Tested And Functions As Intended

Wear Is Light

Comes As Shown

Weighs In At 8 Pounds 10 Onces

Nut Width: 1.65"

Neck Depth: .83" At The 1st Fret - .87" At The 12th Fret

Comes With A Fender Gig Bag

item.title: Hondo II Professional Longhorn Bass. Walnut. (Danelectro type). HP-1181 — $620.09
item.description:
$620.09 · Very Good · tele52

Early 1980s Hondo longhorn bass made in Korea. Serial Number 1020465. All original, no mods, no repairs.

Hondo got the license for the danelectro longhorn in the late 70's and early 80's and put a few unique twists in the mix.

  • Walnut body with a very cool natural transparent finish.
  • Rosewood fretboard with a full 34" scale length, and 24 easily accessible frets, neck D profile, fingerboard radius 10.00.
  • P-bass style pickup with series/ parallel switch, volume and tone knob,
  • One DiMarzio Model P bass pickup, 1 Vol, 1 Tone.
  • Phase In/Out mini-switch (....no sense!!)
  • Pickup with low output. I recommend you to update for a new ones.
  • Everything works EXCEPT switch. I don't know what is for...phase in/out...really?
  • Electronics need to check due pickup ouput and switch.
  • Brass nut and brass bridge
  • Input jack cup is loose from the body. Very easy to fix.
  • Weight 3.6 kilos

Good original condition with a straight neck and good frets. Very cool collectible bass that plays really well and sounds great. Overall the bass guitar is in great shape. Some nicks on the back of the body. The bass guitar has minor superficial dings, scratches, wear and tear around various parts of the guitar, typical of a bass guitar of this age.

See model HP-1081 link >> samick.fandom.com/wiki/HP-1081

About no sense of phase in/out on a single Pbase pickup >> talkbass.com/threads/pbass-wiring-w-phase-switch.704644/

V261, S22, O2

item.title: Spector Euro 5 LT- Tiger Eye Gloss — $2,600
item.description:
$2,600 · Excellent · Albert's Boutique

This bass is near mint condition. I keep all my basses (I own 25 basses) close to pristine condition as possible. This beautiful bass has been played very little which has an active (Darkglass Tone Capsule) preamp, great tone. The 2 top knobs are volume for each pickup. (Knob closest is for bridge p/u, other knob is for neck p/u.)

~Please Note~

There is a Mid Range control knob in the cavity which makes a huge difference in tone. I have it dialed turned more to the left which adds more of a bass/low-end deeper tone moving the dial to the right adds more of a treble tone. Has great P-bass sound if you blend in the neck p/u & a killer Classic Spector tone with the bridge p/u blended in.

There are no dings or scratches on this beauty. I'm selling too thin the herd I own another Spector which all I need is one Spector bass.

It comes with a Mono Gig bag case.

item.title: Switch Bass Vibracell mid 2000s - Black gloss — $500
item.description:
$500 · Good · JD Naveah's Shop

Switch Vibracell guitars are unique, mid-2000s electric instruments famous for being injection-molded from a patented polyurethane resin composite rather than wood. Designed by Trev Wilkinson, these guitars are prized today for their exceptional sustain, wild body contours, and stable, weather-resistant construction. they did not require you to constantly tune based on whether or hot spotlight comes with a nice hard case very nice shape a few minor dents and things but very few scratches see pictures for condition

item.title: Ibanez SRA Upgraded EMGx Rare Bass — $499
item.description:
$499 · Very Good · BMG Music

You don't see these often. The SRA and SRT series were only made a few years. Unique to this model were EMG HZ pickups, a slightly thicker neck (compared to the pencil thin Soundgear series), and contoured body.

I had the stock passive EMG HZ pickups and the terrible budget Ibanez preamp replaced with active EMG DCxs and a 2-band preamp. Holy cow this thing rips now! It sounds just like my Spector 5 string. Same pickups, same pickup location. It's a great bass, lightweight, and in great shape. The only noteworthy ding is in the pics. The black sparkle looks amazing too.

Original pickups and preamp ARE included.

Ships in a padded gig bag.

Note: if you're interested in the bass MINUS all of the upgrades let me know. I'd obviously take a significant discount.

item.title: Ibanez SRMD200 - Candy Apple Matte — $329.74
item.description:
$329.74 · Good · Wentworth Music

Despite inheriting the sleek and sophisticated beauty of the revolutionary SR bass, the SR Mezzo was designed to be fun to play. The SR Mezzo's 32" medium scale allows for both easy playing and a rich low-end. The SR Mezzo's full sonic palette will make hitting the stage a blast. No matter the style of music, the SR Mezzo fits you perfectly.

Features

  • The SR Mezzo's 32" scale neck is 2" shorter than that of the general Ibanez SR models, but the Mezzo stills delivers a powerful low end.

  • The B10 bridge allows fully adjustable intonation and solid tuning stability.

  • Dynamix pickups - Electronics consist of an Ibanez Custom Electronics 2-band EQ and an Ibanez DXP neck pickup and DXJ bridge pickup for extra punch.


Specs

neck type: SRMD4 Maple neck
top/back/body wood: Poplar body
fretboard: Maple fretboard / Black dot inlay
frets: 22 Medium frets
bridge: B10 bridge
neck pickup: Dynamix P neck pickup (Passive)
bridge pickup: Dynamix J bridge pickup (Passive)
equaliser: Ibanez Custom Electronics 2-band EQ
factory tuning: 1G,2D,3A,4E
string gauge: .045/.065/.085/.105
nut: Plastic
hardware colour: Chrome
scale: 812mm/32"
width at nut: 38mm

Includes Hardshell Case

item.title: Warwick Thumb Bass BO5 2000 Natural Oil Ovangkol Made in Germany — $3,553.61
item.description:
$3,553.61 · Very Good · Mihales`s Guitar Shop

For sale slap machine Warwick Thumb Bass 5 BO 2000 Made in Germany.

Great unplayed original condition , very little wear on frets.

Everything works perfectly. Some signs of use on the back.

Freshly oiled and waxed. Ready to use.

Very clean . Growls as it schould.

B 072577-00

1225080000BZOWWW
Produced:
14.02.2000
Description:

Thumb BO, 5-string
Natural Oil finish
Ovangkol body with wenge neck body
Made in Germany

OTHER WORLDWIDE DESTINATIONS CONTACT ME FIRST

Any questions please ask.

item.title: Music Man Stingray Bass HH 3 EQ HH 2006 - Sapphire Black — $1,849
item.description:
$1,849 · Excellent · Paul's Gear Depot

This is an extremely clean example of a 2006 Music Man Stingray Bass HH in Sapphire Black. Bass is so clean I hate using the term near mint but has no real play time on it. I am selling it for a good friend of mine..He was the engineer on the Clapton Layla record.as well as dozens of major artists...excellent guitar player and bass player. He has multiple instruments and is thinning out the collection..They get in the way of his Gold and Platinum records !!! Truth.. He is not a member of Reverb so I decided to list it..Only reasonable offers accepted..no trades please. Non original case but a good case included..I work for the Guitar Center as a Tee so will be pro packed by my guys and shipped to you..ask questions

I ship only in the lower 48 US States. No Alaska, No Hawaii and NO Canada. Shipping will be fixed at 100.00

item.title: Hofner Contemporary Series Violin Bass 2006 - 2019 - Black — $735
item.description:
$735 · Very Good · Don 's Boutique

Stunning black Hofner Contemporary Series violin bass with a semi-hollow body. This four-string electric bass has a rosewood fretboard and two humbucking pickups. Beautiful dark brown finish. It includes a white pearloid control panel with two volume knobs and three slider switches for rhythm/solo, bass, and treble settings. The instrument comes with a fitted black hardshell case and pick guard. Local pick up in Auburn CA available

item.title: Fender Squier Sonic P-Bass -Midnight Blue — $269.99
item.description:
$269.99 · Brand New · Rockin' Robbie's Music

Fender Squier Sonic P-Bass -Midnight Blue

item.title: Fender Deluxe Active Jazz Bass 1997 — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Very Good · Louis's Gear Garage

1997 Fender Deluxe Active Jazz Bass. This is a fantastic era for Fender’s active basses, offering classic jazz playability combined with massive tonal versatility thanks to the active onboard EQ And Suhr pickups.


This instrument has been meticulously gone over, restored, and brought back to peak performance standards.


The late 90s Deluxe Active models are highly sought after for a reason. They bridge the gap between traditional Fender vibe and modern active punch. Whether you need a reliable studio workhorse that can dial in any tone or a rock-solid gigging bass with a premium feel, this Jazz Bass delivers.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '60s Precision Bass 2019 - Present - 3-Color Sunburst — MINT — Loaded w/ Extra Hardware & New Fender Gig Bag — $459
item.description:
$459 · Excellent · Robert's Shop

Squier Classic Vibe '60s Precision Bass — 3-Color Sunburst — MINT — Loaded w/ Extra Hardware & New Fender Gig Bag

Practically brand new. Purchased 3.5 months ago, played approximately 2 hours total at home. No dings, no dents, no scratches, no fret wear — this bass is in mint/near-NOS condition, and comes with several major extras.

About the bass:
This is Squier's tribute to the 1960s Fender Precision Bass — same iconic tone, feel, and looks, at a fraction of the cost of a vintage original. Poplar body in 3-Color Sunburst, maple neck with a slim, comfortable "C" profile and vintage-tint gloss finish, Indian laurel fingerboard with 9.5" radius and 20 narrow-tall frets, 34" scale, synthetic bone nut, Fender-Designed alnico split-coil pickup for that classic punchy, growly P-Bass tone, nickel-plated hardware, vintage-style tuners, and 1960s-inspired headstock markings.

Freshly installed: A new set of LaBella Super Polished Flatwound strings — smooth under the fingers with that warm, vintage flat-wound thump. Huge upgrade in tone and feel over stock rounds.

Bonus hardware included:

This bass ships with more than just the bass — you're getting a full hardware bundle shown in the listing photos.

The original vintage-style bridge and original tortoiseshell pickguard are both included in perfect, unmarked condition, ready to reinstall if you want to keep it fully stock.

An upgraded brand new Hipshot KickAss high-mass bridge is shown in the photos — a drop-in tone and sustain upgrade over the stock bridge, prized by P-Bass players for improved mass, break angle, and low-end punch.

A custom silver anodized aluminum pickguard is installed and shown in the photos. Fits well and looks great overall. Full disclosure: a few of the screw holes are slightly misaligned from the original online purchase — cosmetically it's a non-issue and the guard sits flush, but I'm noting it upfront. Buyer's choice whether to keep it as-is or swap back to the perfect original pickguard mentioned above.

A second pickguard — brand new, unused, black anodized aluminum — has never been installed and is yours to keep as a spare or for a totally different look down the road.

A brand new, unused Fender FB620 Electric Bass Gig Bag is also included — Fender's own padded gig bag, currently retailing for $84.99 direct from Fender. Ready to protect this bass from day one, still unused.

That's 3 pickguards, 2 bridges, and a brand new Fender gig bag included with this bass — everything you need to run it stock, upgraded, restyled, and gig-ready, without spending another dime on parts or a case.

Why this particular bass is special: Squier's quality control on this model can vary from unit to unit, so I actually bought and returned several of these basses before finding this one — the one that played and sounded like it needs to - amazing. This is the keeper. Straight neck, excellent fretwork, no dead spots, and that punchy P-Bass growl right out of the box. You're not getting a random pull off the shelf — you're getting the one chosen by a very selective player (yours truly).

You're getting a mint, hand-picked Classic Vibe P-Bass with premium flatwound strings already installed, PLUS a Hipshot KickAss bridge, two extra pickguards, and a brand new $85 Fender gig bag — all for less than the price of buying the bass new by itself.

Shipping from the US, domestic only. Fast, well-packed shipping in original box. Message with any questions — happy to provide additional photos.

item.title: Markbass GV 5 Gloxy Val CR MP 5-String — $735.48
item.description:
$735.48 · Brand New · Music World Brilon

Markbass GV5 Gloxy Val - Black

  • Korpus: Linde

item.title: Ibanez EHB1505MS EHB 5-String Multiscale Headless Bass - Black Ice Flat — $2,026.18
item.description:
$2,026.18 · Brand New · Wentworth Music

The EHB's headless construction, contoured body, ergonomic design, and chambered body make for a lightweight and comfortable instrument that's excellent for long sets or practice sessions. This series also sports a combination of high-quality tone woods and versatile electronics, resulting in a cutting-edge, ultra-modern bass, capable of cutting though the complex landscape of tones required for today's bassist.

- Bass Workshop -
For more than 40 years, Ibanez has pioneered new frontiers in bass development, pushing the boundaries of conventional designs to bass players of all styles, affording new avenues of expression and creativity. This spirit of exploration has led to the creation of some of the most successful and popular production basses of all time. Following this same drive to bring new and relevant ideas to the musical forefront is what serves as the basis for this ongoing project, dubbed the Ibanez Bass Workshop. The impetus behind each one of these unique instruments comes from a desire by the Ibanez bass development team to satisfy the particular needs of many players. These inventions may not be for everyone, but for those who yearn to explore new sonic vistas through the medium of bass: The Ibanez Bass Workshop project may give you just what you're looking for.

Features

- 9pc Pangapanga/Walnut neck with Graphite reinforcement rods
The 9-piece Panga Panga/Walnut neck provides superior note attack, tight lows and increased sustain.The Graphite reinforcement rods provides massive sustain and excellent stability.

- Panga Panga fretboard
Panga Panga features a beautiful wood grain which produces a tight low and mid range, along with a sharp attack on high end.

- Medium Stainless Steel frets
The Stainless Steel frets are durable and long-lasting.

- Poplar Burl top / Selected light weight African Mahogany body
A stunning Poplar Burl top and a selected light weight African Mahogany body provide a warm tone with rich resonance.

- Nordstrand™ Big Split Custom pickups
The single-coil Nordstrand™ Big Split pickups feature split coils with hum cancelling construction for less noise. The tone character is a hybrid P/J style and provides a rich and strong, yet well-balanced tone, which fits well with various kinds of playing styles.

- Vari-mid 3-band EQ
The Vari-mid 3-band EQ features a variable mid-frequency control which allows you to dial in an incredibly wide range of sounds.

- Ibanez custom headpieces
Rugged yet light-weight Ibanez custom headpieces enable strings to be easily set and released by a hex wrench from the back side.

- MR5HS bridge
The MR5HS bridge is designed specially for EHB basses and features a wide intonation range. Each bridge piece is independently and securely attached to the body for maximum vibration transfer. The saddles are adjustable for string spacing +/-1.5mm, answering every bassist's individual string spacing demands, no matter the playing style. Teflon washers are used on each tuner for a smooth tuning action.

- EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot)
The EQ bypass control offers precision tonal adjustments, including a switch to choose passive-only operation. When the EQ bypass is activated, the treble tone control knob becomes the global tone control for the passive circuit.

- Luminescent side dots
The luminescent side dot position marks make it easy for players to see fretboard position marks when performing on dark stages.

- Schaller S-Locks strap lock pins
Indestructible Schaller S-Locks don't fail, even under the toughest conditions on stage.

- Gig bag included
It comes with Ibanez gig bag which is designed specifically to fit and protect this instrument.

Special Features

- Ergonomic body design
The EHB's headless construction and specially designed body enable the player to maintain a similar playing position whether seated or standing.

- Slanted body back
The top half of the back of the body is slanted which allows the bass to rest slightly closer to the player's body for better control and a more ergonomic feel.

- Comfortably rounded body edge, Chambered body
Its contoured, ergonomic design and chambered body make for a lightweight, well-balanced, and comfortable instrument that's excellent for long sets or practice session.

- Scooped cut on the body back
There is extra carving on the back of the body behind the lower horn for easier upper fret access.

- Detachable Finger ramp
A detachable Finger ramp is included for comfortable finger picking.SPECSActive EQ:Yes - ActiveBody Material:African Mahogany w/ Poplar BurlCase/Gigbag:Gigbag IncludedFingerboard:Panga PangaFretboard Radius:19.7" / 500 mmNeck Material:9-Piece Panga Panga / WalnutNeck Shape:EHB5Nut Width:1.771" / 45.0 mmPickup Configuration:HHScale Length:33-35" / 838.2-889.0 mmScale Type:MultiscaleString Gauge:.045 -.130 D'Addario EXL170-5SLTuning Machines:Ibanez Custom Headless

item.title: Nordstrand Audio NJ5HL 2012 — $3,875.58
item.description:
$3,875.58 · Excellent · GAVRIIL KAMPANTAIS

For sale this very rare Nordstrand hand crafted made in USA in 2012 By Carey Nordstrand, headless NJ5HC

only few basses are made of this model , and now Carey Nordstrand has stopped his hand built USA basses production.

Absolutely near mint conditions!!! 100% original without defects

Swamp Ash body, maple neck, maple burl top… 33,5 scale!!! 3,15 KG!! Insanely light and comfortable to play!!

string spacing 19 mm

Original Nordstrand pickup and original 2 band preamp with passive tone

premium Gig Bag (Reunion Blues)

(you can hear exactly my bass on this video review, from minute 5.00)

item.title: Jackson JS Series JS2 Concert Bass (2019, Snow White) with Rosewood Fretboard – Good Condition, Extremely Playable | Owned & Tested by Mostly Music — $199
item.description:
$199 · Very Good · Mostly Music

MOSTLY MUSIC CERTIFIED INSPECTION This Jackson JS Series JS2 Concert Bass was thoroughly inspected and play-tested by our team. We checked the neck, frets, electronics, hardware, setup, and overall playability. It has some visible cosmetic wear from normal use but remains extremely playable with no issues affecting tone or performance.

THE INSTRUMENT & WHAT IT IS The Jackson JS Series JS2 Concert Bass is a reliable, no-nonsense 4-string bass that has earned a reputation as a tried-and-true workhorse. Built with solid construction and player-friendly features, these basses deliver consistent performance at an accessible price point. The Concert body shape with ergonomic cutaway offers comfortable access to the upper frets, making it a great choice for rock, metal, and a wide range of modern styles.

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

  • Body: Poplar
  • Body Finish: Gloss
  • Body Shape: Concert™ Bass
  • Neck: 1-Piece Bolt-On Maple with Graphite Reinforcement and Scarf Joint
  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Radius: 12" to 16" Compound Radius (304.8 mm to 406.4 mm)
  • Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Fret Size: Jumbo
  • Nut Material: Black Plastic
  • Nut Width: 1.650" (42 mm)
  • Position Inlays: Pearloid Sharkfin
  • Neck Thickness: 1st Fret – .800" (20.32 mm), 12th Fret – .875" (22.23 mm)
  • Truss Rod: Dual-Action (includes wrench)
  • Bridge: Jackson HiMass™
  • Pickups: Jackson® Covered High-Output Humbucking (Neck & Bridge)
  • Pickup Configuration: HH
  • Controls: Volume 1 (Neck Pickup), Volume 2 (Bridge Pickup), Tone
  • Control Knobs: Dome-Style
  • Hardware Finish: Black
  • Tuning Machines: Jackson® Sealed Die-Cast
  • Headstock: Jackson® Pointed 4-In-Line
  • Strings: Nickel Plated Steel (.045–.105 Gauges)
  • Orientation: Right-Hand
  • Pickguard: None

CONDITION & COSMETICS – OUR BUY-IN REPORT Rated Good condition with visible cosmetic wear. The bass shows quite a few dings and scratches from normal use and play. Specific marks include a ding on the front of the headstock and a couple of dings behind the left bout around the ergonomic cutaway area. Despite the cosmetic imperfections, the bass remains extremely playable. The neck is straight, frets are in good shape with plenty of life left, electronics work perfectly, and there are no functional issues. The knobs, switches, and hardware feel solid and responsive. We photographed the wear clearly so you know exactly what you’re getting.

PLAYABILITY & SOUND NOTES FROM OUR TESTING This bass plays extremely well. Action is comfortable, intonation is accurate, and it has good sustain and clear, punchy tone across the fretboard. The ergonomic cutaway makes upper-register playing easy and comfortable. It responds well to both fingerstyle and pick playing and sits nicely in a mix whether you’re playing rock, metal, or other styles. No buzzing, dead spots, or setup issues — it’s ready to go.

WHAT’S INCLUDED WITH THIS BASS Jackson JS Series JS2 Concert Bass in the condition described. No case, gig bag, or additional accessories are included.

MOSTLY MUSIC USAGE TIPS & REAL-WORLD APPLICATIONS The Jackson JS Series basses are known for being reliable, affordable, and great for players who want solid performance without breaking the bank. This JS2 Concert model is an excellent choice for beginners stepping up to a real instrument, intermediate players building their first serious rig, or anyone looking for a dependable backup or practice bass. The tried-and-true design holds up well for live gigs, rehearsals, and recording. The ergonomic cutaway and comfortable neck make it easy to play for extended periods, and the overall build quality means it can take the rigors of regular use while still delivering good tone and playability.

WHY BUY FROM MOSTLY MUSIC We’re not just moving gear — we’re players who opened a store because we know this stuff inside and out. This listing is transparent because that’s how we operate. You’re getting a fully functional Jackson JS Series JS2 Concert Bass with honest condition notes, real testing, and practical application knowledge. Questions? Message us anytime. We actually get it.

item.description:

Fantastic bass! I went to Guitar Center last year with the intent to buy a Mexican Fender. This bass outplayed them by a mile. Fast neck, solid construction, great tone. No issues. Comes with a padded gig bag.

$700 · Excellent · Guitar Shop Of WI

This guitar has been tested and set up by our Guitar Techs in store and is ready to play! Got questions? Message us directly! Currently housed in the Guitar Shop of Wisconsin (in business for 30+ years). All items are serviced by our Professional Guitar / Service Techs and tested before listing. We pack well and ship fast. Items may be returned within 3 days upon delivery. Full refunds are processed once delivered by the carrier and inspected by our technicians. We do not deliver to P.O. boxes. Thank you for looking!

item.title: Silvertone 604 Classic Series Parlor Vintage Sunburst Open Box — $300
item.description:
$300 · Very Good · Blaze's Shop

This is a reissue of a Silvertone 604. It’s in like new co stink, purchased it new for a guitar grouo I was going to attend but that fell through.


This guitar is a 00 size. It did not fit a single 0 size case but it did fit a 0” 0 size case.


It comes with a new guardian case, usually this model does not come with a case or gig bag.

The action is good, but if I kept it I would have it setup as it has a “factory setup.” It could use a nice setup As the on,y setup it has is from the factory.

Thanks for looking and I onoh ship to the lower 48 states.

item.title: Used Ibanez BTB1905 5 String Bass — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Very Good · Fanny’s House of Music

A 5-string bass with so, so much style! This Ibanez BTB1905 has a through-body neck design, a Flamed Maple top, African Mahogany wings, and a satisfyingly wide C-shaped neck. It's an easy player with a nice setup and is in excellent structural condition with a normal amount of cosmetic wear (please inspect photos carefully).

Used/New/Vintage: Used

Neck Shape: Wide, flat C-shape

Cosmetic Issues: Some dings, scratches, blemishes (see photos)

Wood: African Mahogany wings, Flamed Maple top and back

Serial Number: 1811103

Case: Gig Bag

Shipping costs vary by region. Items are returnable within 1 day of delivery. Items must be returned in original, as-shipped condition with all original packaging and no signs of use. Buyer assumes responsibility for all return shipping costs unless the item was not received as described.

item.title: Used 2015 Fender Standard Precision Bass - Black — $550
item.description:
$550 · Excellent · Roxy Music

Used Fender Standard Precision Bass - Black

No International Shipping.

Weight: 8 lbs 15.0 oz

This Used Fender Standard Precision Bass is in excellent shape. The bass has been tested and is fully functional. Cosmetically the bass is very clean with some pick surface scratches.

item.title: Yamaha TRB1006J 6-String Translucent Black w/Gator GCEBX Case — $1,468.05
item.description:
$1,468.05 · Brand New · Musique Max Boutique

PHOTOS ARE OF YOUR NEW BASS!

Weight is 10.8 lbs

Special pricing TRB1006J is now discontinued - this is a brand new bass.

This is the 6-string version of the monster basses in the TRB series. TRB was born as a versatile 6-string bass guitar along with the greater involvement of synthesizers in music in end of 1980s. TRB has employed a longer scale length of 35" to increase crisp tonal character in low range and great feel for string tension. TRB's low-noise PU and 3-band active circuit produce well-balanced clear sound and provide access to a wider range of tonal possibilities. As a result of Yamaha's countless efforts for innovation, TRB has been supported by many professional musicians since its debut in 1989 and become an icon of a 4, 5, and 6-string bass in the world.

Features
• Maple / Mahogany 5-Ply Neck
• Super Long Scale (35")
• 3-Band Active EQ

Specifications
• Scale Length: 35"
• Body Materials: Maple / Alder
• Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
• Neck Materials: Maple / Mahogany 5-Piece
• Neck Construction: Bolt-on
• Neck Finish: Satin Polyurethane
• Fingerboard Materials: Rosewood
• Fingerboard Radius: 40" (1000 mm)
• Number of Frets: 24
• Nut Materials: Bone
• Neck Pickup: Humcanceled Single Coil / Alnico V
• Bridge Pickup: Humcanceled Single Coil / Alnico V
• Controls: Master Volume, Pickup Balancer, 3-Band EQ(Bass, Middle, Treble)
• Bridge: Solid Brass
• Tuning Machines: Die-Cast

  • includes Gator GCEBX hardcase

item.title: RARE Status KingBass Mk-II – INSANE flame, full LEDs Sounds and feels GREAT. Mark King!! — $4,250
item.description:
$4,250 · Excellent · JK's Guitars and Gear

Wow! Here is a great opportunity to own a rare, beautiful and killer bass! Figured wood and LEDs are icing on the cake!

The original KingBass was designed and first introduced in 2001. After sitting down with Mark King and discussing the options we decided to go for a more radical departure.

The KingBass Mk-II is the result. The overall look and feel is obviously a continuation of the original headless KingBass models but some changes include a more “old school” look of the headed neck. Combined with the Status ‘J’ style pickups and slightly larger body shape the overall result is a stunning new bass that Mark described as 

  • “… the best bass Status ever made & the original EQ still sounds perfect.”

Here are some specs:

  • ·Ridiculously Quilted Maple Top
  • ·Woven graphite through-neck
  • ·34″ scale
  • ·24 fret phenolic fingerboard
  • ·Arch-top contouring
  • ·Book-matched facing
  • ·Status’ Custom Front & side Blue LED lights
  • ·Mono-rail bridge
  • ·“Slap-ramp” after the 24th fret
  • ·Original Status case
  • ·Three build sheets (See photos)

 

It is super clean and a very expensive bass if you still can order one. Don’t miss this one!


PLEASE READ… Thanks so much for looking and please check out my other listings. I have a long 24-year history selling on other auction sites, over 1300 sales with 100% positive feedback! Kindly ask all questions prior to purchase. Due to abuses on Reverb and eBay, all sales are final and no returns. Thanks for looking!

item.title: 1985 USA BC Rich Warlock Bass - Black — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Good · Jacob's Crap

1985 BC Rich Warlock Bass. Overall in great shape, but has a few dings/dents/wear marks throughout (see pics). All original, including the electronics. Bass was fully disassembled, cleaned, and a new battery for the active electronics was installed. Includes the original hard shell case. The interior has one spot where the strap button or point wore through it (pictured). Let me know if you have any question!

item.title: 2025 Mint Warrior Dran Michael loaded - Amazing bass — $3,699
item.description:
$3,699 · Mint · Shane's Gear Outlet


I have this listed on Facebook groups without fees so it should go anytime.


One of the basses built by the Legend JD right before he got sick and passed away. This bass is as good as it gets with build, playabilty and tone for days. It is loaded up and used as my main bass for the last 5 months in church. Comes from a smoke free home and is babied and kept like new. This bass would cost you close to $7900 and 6 months to build.I added a video demo of this bass in a full band mix using just a DI box for the tone.


Aged Aldar body

Spalted Maple top and headstock

Blue Burst with Poly finish on Body and headstock

34 scale

8.4 pounds

18mm spacing

2025 Warrior Big Bottom Preamp

USA Bartolini pickups

D-Cline Designs Custom matching knobs

Ebony Fretboard with Abalone Block inlays and sword

Heavy Duty Gigbag

Letter of Authenticity

item.title: Ibanez GSR200 4 String Bass Flat Walnut — $249.99
item.description:
$249.99 · Brand New · Instrumental Music

For decades, the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics.

A guitar doesn't have to cost a lot to sound great. The GIO series was developed for players who want Ibanez quality and performance in a more affordable package. Not only do they look and play better than many other offerings in their price range, but they are held to the same standards and come with warranty is the same as Ibanez's more expensive models.
  • neck type: GSR4 Maple neck
  • top/back/body: Okoume body
  • fretboard: Jatoba fretboardWhite dot inlay
  • fret: Medium frets
  • bridge: B10 bridge
  • string space: 19mm
  • neck pickup: Dynamix P neck pickupPassive
  • bridge pickup: Dynamix J bridge pickupPassive
  • equalizer: Phat II EQ
  • factory tuning: 1G,2D,3A,4E
  • string gauge: .045/.065/.080/.100
  • hardware color: Black

item.title: STARPLAYER BASS BLACK VELVET — $3,547.06
item.description:
$3,547.06 · Brand New · Centro Chitarre

STARPLAYER BASS BLACK VELVET - Basso Elettrico 4 Corde Semi-Hollow Single Cutaway Scala Corta - Serie: Starplayer Bass Series - Made in Europe (Crafted in Germany and Croatia) - Struttura: Set-Neck - Top: Abete - Fasce e Fondo: Acero Fiammato - Manico: Acero - Shape Manico: Medium D - Tastiera: Palissandro Indiano - Scala: 30,2" - Radius: 12" - Numero Tasti: 22 Jumbo - Capotasto: 41 mm - Intarsi Tastiera: Cream Dots - Binding: Crema - Battipenna: Aged White - Pick Up: 2x BassBucker - Controlli: 2x Volume + 1x Tono + On/Off Side Switch - Ponte: Bass Bridge + Trapeze Tailpiece - Meccaniche: Z-Tuners 2+3 - Finitura Hardware: Dorata - Colore: Black - Finitura: Satinata - Corde: Duesenberg Custom .050-.110 - Custodia: Custom Line Case.

item.title: Sadowsky JAPAN MetroExpress Jazz Bass — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · The Bass Garage

Sadowsky (Made in Japan) MetroExpress 4-string Jazz Bass for sale. Built at the ESP factory under the direction of Roger Sadowsky and Sadowsky Japan manager Yoshi Kikuchi in 2018.

These were high end production basses made to the same level of craftsmanship as the Japanese Metro Line basses with the same parts as Sadowsky NYC basses. Miles above the Chinese-made MetroExpresses being built today.

Specs:

  • Solid ash body and a maple fingerboard
  • Olympic white finish and dark tort guard
  • Durable poly finish on the body and sleek nitro finish on the neck
  • Graphite strips in the neck dramatically reduce dead spots and create a more even response on every note
  • Classic Sadowsky Treble and Bass boost pre-amp with true bypass switch
  • Controls: master vol, pickup blend, treble roll-off (VTC) with pre-amp bypass, bass boost, treble boost
  • Sadowsky noiseless JJ pickups
  • Hipshot Licensed tuners (3) and a Sadowsky D-tuner
  • 8.4lbs
